title: Witness Camera Captures An Alien Craft Over Vancouver Island
description: October 1981 – Best Flying Saucer Photo Ever? Mrs. Hannah McRoberts (aged 25) of Campbell River, BC, was with her family at a rest-area some thirty miles to the north of Kelsey Bay on the east coast of Vancouver Island, from October 8 to 15, [...]

title: Trump Forms UFO Board to Investigate 'Mothership' Orb Threat Over Sensitive National Security Site
description: Trump's new UFO board has turned to Avi Loeb as officials look again at unexplained orb reports, declassified data and a mystery near Cheyenne Mountain.

title: Skeptic on UAP panel? That’s fine, up to a point, Ross Coulthart says
Kansas City UFO investigator: Spielberg’s ‘Disclosure Day’ film ‘100% accurate’
description: A longtime UFO investigator in Kansas City says Steven Spielberg’s new movie about extraterrestrials rings true with what she knows and has learned about ETs.

title: Real Life UFO Experts Say Spielberg Captures Reality In ‘Disclosure Day’
description: But the reviews for ‘Disclosure Day’ among the experts on UAPs—unidentified aerial phenomena—are decidedly mixed.
